name: Spicy Peanut Sauce for Satay
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Ground unsalted dry roasted peanuts or 3 tb creamy peanut butter
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pan, heat the thick coconut milk over low heat and cook until it thickens and becomes oily around the edges.
2. Increase the heat. Add the curry paste and cook for 3 to 5 minutes, stirring gently to prevent burning. A noticeable color and odor change indicates proper cooking.
3. Gradually add the thin coconut milk while stirring continuously.
4. Season with fish sauce, sugar, and tamarind water.
5. Stir in the ground peanuts or creamy peanut butter.
6. Serve as a dipping sauce. The sauce will become spicier and thicker as it stands.
